---
output: github_document
---

<!-- README.md is generated from README.Rmd. Please edit that file -->

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.path = "man/figures/README-",
  out.width = "100%"
)
```

# shinyCRUK

<!-- badges: start -->
<!-- badges: end -->

The goal of shinyCRUK is to make it easier to create shiny apps that are on brand and use the helix design system that is coming into place with the website's move to Contentful. 

## Installation

You can install the development version of shinyCRUK from [GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r
# install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("CRUKorg/shinyCRUK")
# or 
remotes::install_github("CRUKorg/shinyCRUK")
```
